meaning: 达曼[沙特阿拉伯东北部港市]
examples: Dammam is the largest city in the Eastern Province; Dammam Port is the largest on the Persian Gulf.
In 1980 a second branch opened in Dammam, but it failed to attract customers since very few expats lived in the area.
The patient -- a 30-year-old man who lived in the country's Eastern Province -- was admitted to a hospital in the city of Dammam on Wednesday with a high fever, cough and shortness of breath.
